module.name: tool
module.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate defining ToolProgram and eight feature-gated native tools whose previews retain explicit host-filtered compatibility, including separate PowerShell, Command Prompt, and Bash binaries.

childModules.name: native
childModules.purpose: Groups eight built-in tools with explicit wildcard or platform-specific compatibility previews that the host filters without rewriting, plus shared compatible JSON parsing and shell execution.
